title: cyperus retroflexus
intro: Cyperus retroflexus, also known as bladderwort, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus retroflexus include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce swelling, and relieve pain. Cyperus retroflexus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine.
